filters.notes: Load stmt_dict.txt line-by-line at runtime. Find int16_t null_stmt_code where stmt_dict[code].empty(). Skip rows where stmt_col[i] == null_stmt_code. NEVER hardcode codes (C2).

scan.notes: Selectivity ~95% → fused scan+filter+aggregate in one loop, no selection vector needed. mmap all four columns, zero-copy via reinterpret_cast (P2). No zone-map skip (column unsorted, C19).

data_structures.thread_local_agg_map: open_addressing_hash_map per thread, cap=next_pow2(12*2)=32, key=uint32_t packed((uint16_t)stmt_code<<16|(uint16_t)rfile_code), slot={int64_t cnt, int64_t line_sum, int64_t line_count, uint16_t stmt_code, uint16_t rfile_code, bool occupied}
data_structures.count_distinct_adsh: std::unordered_set<int32_t>[12] per thread (one set per logical group slot), union-merged at aggregation_merge phase
data_structures.final_merge: sequential merge into global array of 12 slots (T*G = 64*12 = 768 < 100K threshold → sequential merge acceptable)

parallelism.merge_strategy: sequential (T*G=768, trivially small, no partitioned merge needed)
parallelism.notes: Each thread maintains its own agg_map[32] + adsh_sets[32]. After parallel scan barrier, merge all thread-local maps into global result (P20). adsh sets merged via insert-all union.

aggregation.probing: bounded linear probe, for-loop probe < cap (C24)

aggregates.num_filings: COUNT(DISTINCT adsh): insert adsh_col[i] into per-group unordered_set<int32_t>; output set.size() after merge
aggregates.avg_line_num: int64_t line_sum += line_col[i]; int64_t line_count++; output (double)line_sum/line_count

aggregation.precision_note: line column max is small integer → double division is exact, no C29 concern

output.string_decoding: decode stmt_code via stmt_dict[code], rfile_code via rfile_dict[code]
output.quoting: double-quote ALL string output columns: printf("\"%s\"", str.c_str()) (C31)

correctness_notes: C2: load stmt_dict.txt and rfile_dict.txt at runtime — NEVER hardcode dict codes
C9: agg_cap = next_pow2(12*2) = 32 per thread; size for FULL group count not groups/nthreads
C15: composite key MUST include BOTH stmt_code and rfile_code
C18: decode dict codes to strings before output
C24: bounded for-loop probing (probe < cap) in all hash map operations
C31: double-quote stmt and rfile string columns in CSV output
P20: thread-local aggregation is mandatory — no shared aggregation map
